query:
INSERT INTO products (name, description, price, category_id, store_id, image, available, sort_order) VALUES ('Create Your Own Breakfast Roll', 'Build your perfect breakfast roll — choose your base, sauces, and fillings with our +/− quantity selector', '0.00', 60001, 1, 'https://res.cloudinary.com/dqhqrd9st/image/upload/v1/weshop4u/deliimage.jpg', true, 2);
SELECT id FROM products WHERE name = 'Create Your Own Breakfast Roll' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
